items.title: 'Screw MasterCard' — Dave Ramsey Tells Dad With $26K In Consumer Debt And Weekly Overdrafts To Feed His Triplets First
items.description: A father of 4-year-old triplets told "The Ramsey Show" that repeated overdrafts left his $3,600 monthly take-home pay stretched too thin to cover basic needs. Travis, calling from Toledo, Ohio, said his bank account goes negative almost every week. He supports a family of five on one income while attending trade school at night, and said grocery spending is what most often pushes his balance into overdraft. When the discussion turned to which bills should be paid first when money is limited, per

items.title: United Parcel Service (UPS) Is Up 6.3% After Margin-Focused Earnings Beat From Efficiency Reimagined
items.description: United Parcel Service recently reported quarterly results that exceeded analyst expectations on revenue, EPS and EBITDA, helped by its early-stage Efficiency Reimagined turnaround plan and cost-cutting measures, including facility closures and automation investments. A key element of this shift is UPS reducing low- and negative-margin Amazon volume while prioritizing higher-margin healthcare and small and medium-sized business deliveries, which is beginning to show up in improved operating...
